Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates that the patient has been diagnosed with "Other and unspecified hyperlipidemia." This diagnosis is a clear indication of a lipid metabolism disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this diagnosis is explicitly mentioned, it is reasonable to predict that the patient will have "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" coded in their next hospital visit, as there is strong evidence of an existing lipid disorder that is likely to be managed or monitored in future visits.
